name: anemia
title: best herbal teas for anemia
description: Zingiber officinale tea contains bioactive constituents such as gingerols and shogaols that have been found to help treat anemia by increasing red blood cell count and hemoglobin production. The tea's properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, also help to alleviate symptoms of anemia such as fatigue and weakness.
